New Project Support to KHAS from TUBITAK 1002 Rapid Support Program

Prof. Dr. Aslı Erciyes from our Department of Psychology. Prof. Dr. Aslı Erciyes’ project titled “The Effect of the Direction of Writing in the Acquired Second Language on the Perception of the Direction of Time Flow” was entitled to be supported within the scope of TÜBİTAK 1002 Rapid Support Program.

We congratulate Aslı and wish her success in her research.
